# Paaji Connect

> India's premier relationship coaching platform offering breakup recovery, communication coaching, and trust rebuilding programs.

## About Us
Paaji Connect is a relationship coaching platform operating primarily in India. We specialize in providing guidance for partners, couples, and individuals facing relationship issues. Some of our major domains include:
- Breakup Recovery Coaching
- Communication Coaching for Couples
- Relationship Conflict Resolution
- Long Distance Relationship Advice
- Trust Rebuilding After Cheating

We conduct our sessions privately and online, ensuring accessible support across all regions.
